column14:
A pure, undeniable mistake. The text clearly means
one thing, but the dataset says the exact opposite.
There is no philosophical debate; the original 
human annotator simply messed up.
column17:

but two perfectly reasonable humans could read 
the exact same sentence and disagree on what 
emotion it conveys.
